channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [TELGE] Telge Projects Ltd: Auditor Resigns from Material Subsidiary
item.description:
A V H K And Associates, the statutory auditors of Telge Global Inc. (formerly known as Telge Projects Inc.), a material subsidiary of Telge Projects Ltd, have resigned effective May 15, 2026, due to pre-occupation and prior commitments. Anil Khatal & Co. will be appointed as the new statutory auditors. The company has provided details of the resignation as required under Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations.

  • A V H K And Associates resigned as statutory auditors of Telge Global Inc.
  • Resignation is effective from May 15, 2026.
  • Anil Khatal & Co. will be appointed as the new statutory auditors.
  • The resignation is due to the auditor's pre-occupation and prior commitments.
  • No objections were raised for the appointment of a new auditor.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Telge Projects Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [JKIPL] Jinkushal Industries: Anil Kumar Jain Appointed Chairman
item.description:
Jinkushal Industries Ltd. announced the re-designation of Mr. Anil Kumar Jain as Chairman cum Executive Director and Mr. Abhinav Jain as Managing Director, effective May 16, 2026, subject to member approval. Mr. Anil Kumar Jain will provide strategic guidance, while Mr. Abhinav Jain will lead overall business operations and growth. The company confirms that neither director is debarred from holding office by any regulatory authority.

  • Anil Kumar Jain re-designated as Chairman cum Executive Director effective May 16, 2026.
  • Abhinav Jain re-designated as Managing Director for a 5-year term from May 16, 2026.
  • Leadership changes aim to strengthen governance and drive sustainable growth.
  • Both directors confirmed to be free from any regulatory prohibitions.
  • Re-designations are subject to member approval in the upcoming General Meeting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jinkushal Industries Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [GENUSPOWER] Genus Power Appoints Vinod Raheja as CFO
item.description:
Genus Power Infrastructures Ltd has appointed Mr. Vinod Raheja as the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) effective May 18, 2026. This appointment is part of a leadership transition where Mr. Nathu Lal Nama, previously overseeing finance and accounts as Whole-time Director, will transition out of the CFO role but continue as Whole-time Director. The board also approved the appointment of K. G. Goyal & Associates as cost auditors for the financial year 2026-27 and reviewed the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Vinod Raheja appointed as CFO of Genus Power effective May 18, 2026.
  • Nathu Lal Nama transitions from CFO role, remains Whole-time Director.
  • K. G. Goyal & Associates appointed as cost auditors for FY 2026-27.
  • Board approved audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GENUS POWER INFRASTRUCTURES LTD.-$ | Category: Management Change

item.title: [DIGILOGIC] Digilogic Systems to Incorporate Subsidiary: Abhedhya Systems
item.description:
Digilogic Systems Ltd's board approved the incorporation of a subsidiary, Abhedhya Systems Private Limited, specializing in Radio Frequency (RF) and Microwave engineering solutions. The subsidiary's registered office will be in Hyderabad, Telangana, India. Digilogic Systems will hold 80% of the share capital, investing ₹4,00,000 by subscribing to 40,000 equity shares at ₹10 each. The authorized capital is ₹15,00,000 and paid-up capital is ₹5,00,000. No governmental or regulatory approvals are required.

  • Digilogic Systems incorporates Abhedhya Systems as a subsidiary.
  • Abhedhya Systems will focus on RF and Microwave engineering solutions.
  • Digilogic Systems will hold 80% stake with an initial investment of ₹4,00,000.
  • The subsidiary's registered office will be located in Hyderabad, India.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Digilogic Systems Ltd | Category: Subsidiary

item.title: [SHEMAROO] Shemaroo FY26 Audited Financial Results Approved
item.description:
Shemaroo Entertainment Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026. The board also approved the re-appointment of M/s Mukund M. Chitale & Co. as Statutory Auditor for a second term of five years, and M/s Joshi Apte & Associates as Cost Auditor for FY 2026-2027. Mr. Amit Haria resigned as CFO effective May 21, 2026, and Mr. Ashish Gupta was appointed as the new CFO effective May 22, 2026.

  • Standalone and consolidated audited financial results for FY26 approved.
  • Mukund M. Chitale & Co. re-appointed as Statutory Auditor for five years.
  • Joshi Apte & Associates re-appointed as Cost Auditor for FY26-27.
  • Amit Haria resigned as CFO effective May 21, 2026.
  • Ashish Gupta appointed as CFO effective May 22, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shemaroo Entertainment Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [JRELTD] Eraaya Lifespaces EGM on June 8, 2026 for Name Change
item.description:
Eraaya Lifespaces Ltd has announced an Extra-Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) to be held on June 08, 2026, via video conference to approve changing the company name to 'Ebix Limited' and to appoint Prof. Anil Kumar as a director. The notice of the EGM has been sent to shareholders who held shares as of May 08, 2026. E-voting will be available from June 05, 2026, to June 07, 2026, through NSDL.

  • Eraaya Lifespaces EGM scheduled for June 08, 2026, to approve name change to 'Ebix Limited'.
  • E-voting for the EGM will commence on June 05, 2026, and end on June 07, 2026.
  • The EGM will also include the appointment of Prof. Anil Kumar as a director.
  • Cut-off date for determining members eligible for e-voting is June 01, 2026.
  • Shareholders as of May 08, 2026, will receive the EGM notice via email.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Justride Enterprises Ltd | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [PAISALO] Paisalo Digital: Promoter Encumbers Shares for Margin Trading
item.description:
Paisalo Digital Ltd's promoter group entity, PRI CAF PRIVATE LIMITED, disclosed the creation of pledges on shares of Paisalo Digital Limited. The encumbrance, executed on May 14 and 15, 2026, involves multiple promoters including Mr. Sunil Purushottam M Agarwal, Mr. Santanu Agarwal, PRO FITCCH PVT. LTD., and EQUILIBRATED VENTURE CFLOW PVT. LTD. The pledges were created to avail margin trading facilities and do not involve any transfer of ownership or control. Bajaj Financial Securities Limited is the entity in whose favor the shares are encumbered.

  • Promoter group entity PRI CAF PRIVATE LIMITED created pledges on Paisalo Digital shares.
  • The encumbrance occurred on May 14 and 15, 2026, for margin trading purposes.
  • Promoters Sunil Purushottam M Agarwal and Santanu Agarwal encumbered shares.
  • Bajaj Financial Securities Limited is the beneficiary of the share encumbrances.
  • Encumbered shares represent 12.61% of promoter shareholding.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Paisalo Digital Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [PAISALO] Paisalo Digital: Promoter Encumbers Shares for Margin Trading
item.description:
Paisalo Digital Ltd. announced that promoters, including Santanu Agarwal, have created pledges on their shares for availing margin trading facilities. The encumbrance does not involve any transfer of ownership or control of shares. The disclosure was made on May 16, 2026, in compliance with SEBI regulations.

  • Promoters created pledges on shares of Paisalo Digital for margin trading.
  • The encumbrance does not involve transfer of ownership or control.
  • Bajaj Financial Securities Limited is the entity in whose favor shares are encumbered.
  • Santanu Agarwal's total promoter shareholding is 3.86%, with 4.13% encumbered.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Paisalo Digital Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [PAISALO] Paisalo Digital: Promoter Encumbrance on Shares
item.description:
Paisalo Digital Ltd. received disclosures regarding the encumbrance of shares by promoters under SEBI regulations. PRO FITCCH PRIVATE LIMITED, along with other promoters, created pledges on their shares for availing margin trading facility. The encumbrance does not involve transfer of ownership or control of shares. Bajaj Financial Securities Limited is the entity in whose favor shares are encumbered. Encumbered shares as a % of promoter shareholding is 13.71%.

  • Promoters of Paisalo Digital created pledges on shares for margin trading.
  • The encumbrance does not involve transfer of ownership or control.
  • Bajaj Financial Securities Limited is the entity in whose favor shares are encumbered.
  • PRO FITCCH PRIVATE LIMITED's encumbered shares are 13.71% of promoter shareholding.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Paisalo Digital Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [ANANTAM] Anantam Highways Trust Announces Earnings Call on May 21, 2026
item.description:
Anantam Highways Trust announced an earnings conference call to be held on Thursday, May 21, 2026, at 03:00 P.M. (IST) for the period ended March 31, 2026. The call will be hosted by Alpha Alternatives Fund-Infra Advisors Private Limited, the Investment Manager to the Trust. Participants can pre-register using the provided link and are requested to join 10 minutes prior to the scheduled time. Contact details for the call coordinator, Chandra Kant Sharma, are also provided.

  • Anantam Highways Trust to hold earnings call on May 21, 2026.
  • Call is for the period ended March 31, 2026.
  • Alpha Alternatives Fund-Infra Advisors Private Limited is hosting the call.
  • Pre-registration is available via a provided link.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Anantam Highways Trust | Category: Board Meeting
